entity: Michael Jordan 69 PTS + 18 REB vs Cleveland Cavaliers on 1990-03-28 (CHI 117-113 OT; the 4th-highest single-game point total in NBA history at the time, and Jordan's career high)

query_target.sql: SELECT player_name, team_abbreviation, game_date, pts, reb, ast, season_year FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE player_name = 'Michael Jordan' AND game_date = '1990-03-28' AND pts = 69 LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player; match:containsObject with exact values. The 69-point game is pre-1996-97, so fact_player_game_log doesn't have it; analytics_player_game_complete covers the full historical back to 1946. The game went to overtime.
